---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

Describe the problem or use-case this feature would address. Why is the current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternative approaches you've considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or any other context that would help evaluate the request.
